channel.title: technology on Udeshya
channel.description: Recent content in technology on Udeshya

item.title: The problem with tiktok
item.description: Tiktok, Image courtesy in the footer It was early 2018 when teens all around the world started using an app called Musically. It was a video sharing social media app founded by Alex Zhu, a Chinese entrepreneur . Mainly used for making lip sync videos, the app’s popularity skyrockted within months, if not, weeks. Suddenly, around the August of 2018, Musically was shut down overnight. But, that wasn’t the end of it.
